title: Fancy Vanilla
description: A texturepack made for PVP and survival with some QOL changes and some retextures to keep the game clean and fresh
body:
**Fancy Vanilla** is similar to **Vanilla PVP** but includes more noticable texture changes such as custom sword, axe and bow textures. It also includes QOL textures such as blue ancient debre, blue powdered snow and red trapped chests

The texturepack is able to be run on most versions above 1.21

credits: @tavoid
